title: Async Resource Context
description: Implement an async context manager 'AsyncResource' using __aenter__ and __aexit__. It should simulate a connection with 'await self.connect()' and 'await self.close()'.
test_script:
import unittest, asyncio
from async_ctx import AsyncResource
class TestAsyncCtx(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_context(self):
        async def run():
            async with AsyncResource() as res: return True
        self.assertTrue(asyncio.run(run()))
